---
title: "SDH inhibition snMultiome RNA & ATAC-seq"
author: "Dakota Nuttall"
date: "2025-06-17"
R-version: 4.3.3
---
###Myeloid, Endothelial Cell, Mural and Lymph Analysis###

```{r include=FALSE}
set.seed(1234)
library(Seurat)
library(Signac)
library(chromVAR)
library(dplyr)
library(reticulate)
library(hdf5r)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(readxl)
library(EnsDb.Mmusculus.v79)
library(BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(JASPAR2020)
library(TFBSTools)
library(harmony)
library(pheatmap)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggpubr)
```
####  Load data  ####

```{r echo=TRUE}
#Load integrated file
aggregated_samples <- readRDS("aggregated_global.rds")

clust_colors <- c("darkorange2","mediumorchid2","steelblue3","olivedrab","indianred1","hotpink","darkred","green3","cyan","darkorange4","mediumorchid4","steelblue4")
treatment_colors <-c("lightskyblue","pink", "steelblue4","red3")    
```

## Endothelial Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Endothelial_Cells (EC) population

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Endothelial Cells")

```
###Re-normalize and re-run PCA analysis (repeat after contamination removal)

```{r echo=TRUE}

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- SCTransform(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000)

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunPCA(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, npcs = 50)
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunHarmony(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 
                              group.by.vars = "orig.ident",
                              reduction = "pca", assay.use = "SCT", reduction.save = "harmony_pca",project.dim= F)
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- FindNeighbors(object = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- "SCT"

FindDimNumber(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunUMAP(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca",reduction.name = "umap_RNA", reduction.key = "UMAP")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells)
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunSVD(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunUMAP(object = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, reduction = 'harmony_lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap_peakunion", reduction.key = "peakunionUMAP_")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "harmony_lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:30, 2:30),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE
)
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)

```
### Check for potential contamination (skip if already preformed)
```{r echo=TRUE}

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells<- FindClusters(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.2,1,.2) )

Idents(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- aggregated_Endothelial_Cells$wsnn_res.0.6

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
annotation_markers <- c("Myh6","Ttn","Tnnt2","Ryr2", #Cardiomyocytes
                        "Col1a1","Postn","Pdgfra","Gsn","Htra3",#Cardiac Fibroblasts
                        "Cdh5","Fabp4","Pecam1","Kdr",#Endothelial Cells
                        "Rgs5","Kcnj8","P2ry14","Pdgfrb","Vtn",#Mural cells
                        "Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Ms4a7","Ccr2","Cx3cr1",#Myeloid Cells
                        "Cd79a","Ikzf3","Ms4a1","Skap1",#Lymphoid Cells
                        "Upk3b","Upk1b","Clu","Dmkn",# Epicardial cells
                        "Kcna1","Kcna2","Cdh19","Plp1", #Schwann cells
                        "Hbb-bs","Hbb-bt")#RBC markers that often contaminate ECs

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, gene_vector = annotation_markers)

contaminated <- Cells(subset(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, idents = c("5","9")) )
low_quality <- readLines("low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2.txt")
low_quality <- c(low_quality,contaminated)
writeLines(low_quality, "low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2+EC.txt")

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells <- subset(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, idents = c("5","9"), invert = T) 

##Go back to redo normalization and check again

```
## Annotate (use fotplot above to double check for contamination)
```{r echo=TRUE}
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells<- FindClusters(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.1,.5,.1) )

Idents(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- aggregated_Endothelial_Cells$wsnn_res.0.3

#Use markers to identify sub-cell types
annotation_markers <- c( "Cdh5","Pecam1",#General EC
                         "Fabp4","Vegfc",#Vasc EC
                          "Cdh11","Npr3",#Endocardium
                         "Mki67","Aurkb", # Proliferative EC
                        "Lyve1","Flt4"#Lymphoid EC
                        )
##"Mctp1","Zfp521"#Venous ECs

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, gene_vector = annotation_markers)
quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)

Endothelial_Cells_cell_types <- c("VEC1","VEC2","VEC3","EndoC","VEC4","VEC_Prol","LEC")
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells@active.ident, labels = Endothelial_Cells_cell_types)
Endothelial_Cells_cell_levels <- c("VEC1","VEC2","VEC3","VEC4","EndoC","VEC_Prol","LEC")
aggregated_Endothelial_Cells@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells@active.ident, levels = Endothelial_Cells_cell_levels)

aggregated_Endothelial_Cells$Cell_state <- Idents(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells)

annotation_markers <- c( "Cdh5","Pecam1",#General EC
                         "Fabp4","Vegfc",#Vasc EC
                          "Cdh11","Npr3",#Endocardium
                         "Mki67","Aurkb", # Proliferative EC
                        "Lyve1","Flt4"#Lymphoid EC
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, gene_vector = annotation_markers,pt.size = 14)
ggsave("EC_dotplot.tif", height = 5.5,width = 5.5)

#Identify DEGS
DefaultAssay(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells) <- "SCT"
EC_all_DEGs <- FindAllMarkers(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT", return.thresh = 1 )
EC_all_DEGs$gene <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(EC_all_DEGs))
EC_all_DEGs <- EC_all_DEGs %>% group_by(cluster) %>% mutate(BH_p_val_adj = p.adjust(p_val, method = "BH")) 
EC_all_DEGs <- EC_all_DEGs[!grepl("mt-",EC_all_DEGs$gene),]#Mitochondrial RNA is typically removed during nuclear exraction but some can be bound to ER during extraction so it is removed 
EC_all_DEGs <- as.data.frame(EC_all_DEGs)
EC_all_DEGs_sig <- subset(EC_all_DEGs, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.xlsx(EC_all_DEGs_sig,"EC_all_DEGs_sig.xlsx")

#These functions can be found in the helper functions script
proportion_plots(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, cond_color = treatment_colors, clust_color = clust_colors, name.clust = "EC_prop_sub.tif", name.cond = "EC_prop_cond.tif",height = 4, width = 4)

prop_heatmap(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, "EC_heat_prop.tif")

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 1,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T, font.size = 10)
ggsave("Endothelial_Cells_umap_sub.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, 1,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
ggsave("Endothelial_Cells_umap_cond.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)

#Save dataset
saveRDS(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells,"Endothelial_Cells.rds")

```
## Condition comparisons
```{r echo=TRUE}
#Perform differential expression analysis between treatment Sham and MI treatments using MAST

EC_SalShamvMalSham  <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, ident.1 = "Saline_Sham", ident.2 = "Malonate_Sham",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    EC_SalShamvMalSham$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(EC_SalShamvMalSham$p_val, method='BH')
    EC_SalShamvMalSham$gene <- rownames(EC_SalShamvMalSham)
    EC_SalShamvMalSham <- EC_SalShamvMalSham[!grepl("mt-",EC_SalShamvMalSham$gene),]
    EC_SalShamvMalSham$comparison <- "Saline Sham vs Malonate Sham"
EC_SalShamvMalSham_sig <- subset(EC_SalShamvMalSham, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(EC_SalShamvMalSham), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(EC_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(EC_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=5))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(EC_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(EC_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=5)), "')")

up_down_volcano(EC_SalShamvMalSham, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline Sham Upregulated Genes (",sum(EC_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate Sham upregulated Genes (",sum(EC_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "EC_SalShamvMalSham_volcano.tif", up_x = max(EC_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)+1.5,down_x = min(EC_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)-1.5,cols = c("pink2","lightskyblue3","grey" ))

EC_SalMIvMalMI <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Endothelial_Cells, ident.1 = "Saline_MI", ident.2 = "Malonate_MI",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    EC_SalMIvMalMI$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(EC_SalMIvMalMI$p_val, method='BH')
    EC_SalMIvMalMI$gene <- rownames(EC_SalMIvMalMI)
    EC_SalMIvMalMI <- EC_SalMIvMalMI[!grepl("mt-",EC_SalMIvMalMI$gene),]
    EC_SalMIvMalMI$comparison <- "Saline MI vs Malonate MI"
EC_SalMIvMalMI_sig <- subset(EC_SalMIvMalMI, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(EC_SalMIvMalMI), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(EC_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(EC_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(EC_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15) ,head(row.names(subset(EC_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15)), "')")

up_down_volcano(EC_SalMIvMalMI, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline MI Upregulated Genes (",sum(EC_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate MI upregulated Genes (",sum(EC_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "EC_SalMIvMalMI_volcano.tif", up_x = max(EC_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)+1,down_x = min(EC_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)-1,cols = c("red3","steelblue4","grey" ))

#Save combined data
combined_EC_DESeq <- rbind(EC_SalShamvMalSham_sig,EC_SalMIvMalMI_sig)
write.xlsx(combined_EC_DESeq,"EC_Sal_vs_Mal_sig.xlsx")

```
## Mural Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Mural (Mural) population

aggregated_Mural <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Mural Cells")

```
###Re-normalize and re-run PCA analysis (repeat after contamination removal)

```{r echo=TRUE}

aggregated_Mural <- SCTransform(aggregated_Mural, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000)

aggregated_Mural <- RunPCA(aggregated_Mural, npcs = 50)
aggregated_Mural <- RunHarmony(aggregated_Mural, 
                              group.by.vars = "orig.ident",
                              reduction = "pca", assay.use = "SCT", reduction.save = "harmony_pca",project.dim= F)
aggregated_Mural <- FindNeighbors(object = aggregated_Mural, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Mural) <- "SCT"

FindDimNumber(aggregated_Mural)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Mural, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")
aggregated_Mural <- RunUMAP(aggregated_Mural, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca",reduction.name = "umap_RNA", reduction.key = "UMAP")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Mural) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Mural <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Mural, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Mural<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Mural)
aggregated_Mural <- RunSVD(aggregated_Mural)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Mural, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")

aggregated_Mural <- RunUMAP(object  = aggregated_Mural, reduction = 'harmony_lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap_peakunion", reduction.key = "peakunionUMAP_")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Mural) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Mural <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Mural,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "harmony_lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:30, 2:30),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE
)
aggregated_Mural <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Mural,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)

```
## Check for contamination
```{r echo=TRUE}


aggregated_Mural<- FindClusters(aggregated_Mural, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.1,.5,.1) )

Idents(aggregated_Mural) <- aggregated_Mural$wsnn_res.0.5

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Mural, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Mural, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
annotation_markers <- c("Myh6","Ttn","Tnnt2","Ryr2", #Cardiomyocytes
                        "Col1a1","Postn","Pdgfra","Gsn","Htra3",#Cardiac Fibroblasts
                        "Cdh5","Fabp4","Pecam1","Kdr",#Endothelial Cells
                        "Rgs5","Kcnj8","P2ry14","Pdgfrb","Vtn",#Mural cells
                        "Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Ms4a7","Ccr2","Cx3cr1",#Myeloid Cells
                        "Cd79a","Ikzf3","Ms4a1","Skap1",#Lymphoid Cells
                        "Upk3b","Upk1b","Clu","Dmkn",# Epicardial cells
                        "Kcna1","Kcna2","Cdh19","Plp1")#Schwann cells

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Mural, gene_vector = annotation_markers)

contaminated <- Cells(subset(aggregated_Mural, idents = "4") )
low_quality <- readLines("low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2+EC.txt")
low_quality <- c(low_quality,contaminated)
writeLines(low_quality, "low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2+EC+Mur.txt")

aggregated_Mural <- subset(aggregated_Mural, idents = "4", invert = T) 

##Go back to redo normalization and check again


```
## Annotate
```{r echo=TRUE}
aggregated_Mural<- FindClusters(aggregated_Mural, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.1,.5,.1) )

Idents(aggregated_Mural) <- aggregated_Mural$wsnn_res.0.5

#Use markers to identify sub-cell types
annotation_markers <- c( "Rgs5","Mcam",#General Mural cells
                         "Pdgfrb","P2ry14","Cspg4",#Pericytes
                         "Acta2","Tagln","Myl9" # Smooth Muscle Cells
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Mural, gene_vector = annotation_markers)


Mural_cell_types <- c("PC1","PC2","PC3","SMC")
aggregated_Mural@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Mural@active.ident, labels = Mural_cell_types)

Mural_cell_levels <- c("PC1","PC2","PC3","SMC")
aggregated_Mural@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Mural@active.ident, levels = Mural_cell_levels)

aggregated_Mural$Cell_state <- Idents(aggregated_Mural)

annotation_markers <- c( "Rgs5","Mcam",#General Mural cells
                         "Pdgfrb","P2ry14","Cspg4",#Pericytes
                         "Acta2","Tagln","Myl9" # Smooth Muscle Cells
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Mural, gene_vector = annotation_markers,pt.size = 14)
ggsave("Mural_dotplot.tif", height = 5,width = 5)

#Identify DEGS
DefaultAssay(aggregated_Mural) <- "SCT"
Mural_all_DEGs <- FindAllMarkers(aggregated_Mural, only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT", return.thresh = 1 )
Mural_all_DEGs$gene <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(Mural_all_DEGs))
Mural_all_DEGs <- Mural_all_DEGs %>% group_by(cluster) %>% mutate(BH_p_val_adj = p.adjust(p_val, method = "BH")) 
Mural_all_DEGs <- Mural_all_DEGs[!grepl("mt-",Mural_all_DEGs$gene),]#Mitochondrial RNA is typically removed during nuclear exraction but some can be bound to ER during extraction so it is removed 
Mural_all_DEGs <- as.data.frame(Mural_all_DEGs)
Mural_all_DEGs_sig <- subset(Mural_all_DEGs, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.xlsx(Mural_all_DEGs_sig,"Mural_all_DEGs_sig.xlsx")

#These functions can be found in the helper functions script
proportion_plots(aggregated_Mural, cond_color = treatment_colors, clust_color = clust_colors, name.clust = "Mural_prop_sub.tif", name.cond = "Mural_prop_cond.tif",height = 4, width = 4)

prop_heatmap(aggregated_Mural, "Mural_heat_prop.tif")

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Mural, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T, font.size = 14)
ggsave("Mural_Cells_umap_sub.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Mural, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
ggsave("Mural_Cells_umap_cond.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)

#Save dataset
saveRDS(aggregated_Mural,"Mural.rds")

```
## Condition comparisons
```{r echo=TRUE}
#Perform differential expression analysis between treatment Sham and MI treatments using MAST

Mural_SalShamvMalSham  <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Mural, ident.1 = "Saline_Sham", ident.2 = "Malonate_Sham",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    Mural_SalShamvMalSham$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(Mural_SalShamvMalSham$p_val, method='BH')
    Mural_SalShamvMalSham$gene <- rownames(Mural_SalShamvMalSham)
    Mural_SalShamvMalSham <- Mural_SalShamvMalSham[!grepl("mt-",Mural_SalShamvMalSham$gene),]
    Mural_SalShamvMalSham$comparison <- "Saline Sham vs Malonate Sham"
Mural_SalShamvMalSham_sig <- subset(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(Mural_SalShamvMalSham), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=5))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=5)), "')")

up_down_volcano(Mural_SalShamvMalSham, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline Sham Upregulated Genes (",sum(Mural_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate Sham upregulated Genes (",sum(Mural_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "Mural_SalShamvMalSham_volcano.tif", up_x = max(Mural_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)+1.5,down_x = min(Mural_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)-1.5,cols = c("pink2","lightskyblue3","grey" ))

Mural_SalMIvMalMI <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Mural, ident.1 = "Saline_MI", ident.2 = "Malonate_MI",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    Mural_SalMIvMalMI$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(Mural_SalMIvMalMI$p_val, method='BH')
    Mural_SalMIvMalMI$gene <- rownames(Mural_SalMIvMalMI)
    Mural_SalMIvMalMI <- Mural_SalMIvMalMI[!grepl("mt-",Mural_SalMIvMalMI$gene),]
    Mural_SalMIvMalMI$comparison <- "Saline MI vs Malonate MI"
Mural_SalMIvMalMI_sig <- subset(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(Mural_SalMIvMalMI), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=8),head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=8) ,head(row.names(subset(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15)), "')")

up_down_volcano(Mural_SalMIvMalMI, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline MI Upregulated Genes (",sum(Mural_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate MI upregulated Genes (",sum(Mural_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "Mural_SalMIvMalMI_volcano.tif", up_x = max(Mural_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)+1,down_x = min(Mural_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)-1,cols = c("red3","steelblue4","grey" ))

#Save combined data
combined_Mural_DESeq <- rbind(Mural_SalShamvMalSham_sig,Mural_SalMIvMalMI_sig)
write.xlsx(combined_Mural_DESeq,"Mural_Sal_vs_Mal_sig.xlsx")

```
## Myeloid Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Myeloid (Mye) population

aggregated_Myeloid <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Myeloid Cells")

```
###Re-normalize and re-run PCA analysis (repeat after contamination removal)

```{r echo=TRUE}

aggregated_Myeloid <- SCTransform(aggregated_Myeloid, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000)

aggregated_Myeloid <- RunPCA(aggregated_Myeloid, npcs = 50)
aggregated_Myeloid <- RunHarmony(aggregated_Myeloid, 
                              group.by.vars = "orig.ident",
                              reduction = "pca", assay.use = "SCT", reduction.save = "harmony_pca",project.dim= F)
aggregated_Myeloid <- FindNeighbors(object = aggregated_Myeloid, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Myeloid) <- "SCT"

FindDimNumber(aggregated_Myeloid)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Myeloid, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")
aggregated_Myeloid <- RunUMAP(aggregated_Myeloid, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca",reduction.name = "umap_RNA", reduction.key = "UMAP")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Myeloid) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Myeloid <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Myeloid, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Myeloid<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Myeloid)
aggregated_Myeloid <- RunSVD(aggregated_Myeloid)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Myeloid, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")

aggregated_Myeloid <- RunUMAP(object = aggregated_Myeloid, reduction = 'harmony_lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap_peakunion", reduction.key = "peakunionUMAP_")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Myeloid) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Myeloid <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Myeloid,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "harmony_lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:50, 2:30),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE
)
aggregated_Myeloid <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Myeloid,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)
```
## Check for contamination
```{r echo=TRUE}

aggregated_Myeloid<- FindClusters(aggregated_Myeloid, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.2,1,.2) )

Idents(aggregated_Myeloid) <- aggregated_Myeloid$wsnn_res.1

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Myeloid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Myeloid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
annotation_markers <- c("Myh6","Ttn","Tnnt2","Ryr2", #Cardiomyocytes
                        "Col1a1","Postn","Pdgfra","Gsn","Htra3",#Cardiac Fibroblasts
                        "Cdh5","Fabp4","Pecam1","Kdr",#Endothelial Cells
                        "Rgs5","Kcnj8","P2ry14","Pdgfrb","Vtn",#Mural cells
                        "Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Ms4a7","Ccr2","Cx3cr1",#Myeloid Cells
                        "Cd79a","Ikzf3","Ms4a1","Skap1",#Lymphoid Cells
                        "Upk3b","Upk1b","Clu","Dmkn",# Epicardial cells
                        "Kcna1","Kcna2","Cdh19","Plp1")#Schwann cells

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Myeloid, gene_vector = annotation_markers)

##No clear contamination detected

```
## Annotate
```{r echo=TRUE}
#Use markers to identify sub-cell types
annotation_markers <- c("Ly6c2","Arhgap15","Ccr2","Cx3cr1", # Monocyte
                        "Itgam","Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Lyve1"#Myeloid Cells
                        
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Myeloid, gene_vector = annotation_markers)


Myeloid_cell_types <- c("MP1","MP2","MP3","MP1","MP4","Mono","MP5")
aggregated_Myeloid@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Myeloid@active.ident, labels = Myeloid_cell_types)

Myeloid_cell_levels <- c("Mono","MP1","MP2","MP3","MP4","MP5")
aggregated_Myeloid@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Myeloid@active.ident, levels = Myeloid_cell_levels)

aggregated_Myeloid$Cell_state <- Idents(aggregated_Myeloid)

annotation_markers <- c("Ccr2","Arhgap15","Plac8","Ifitm6", # Monocyte
                        "Itgam","Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Lyve1"#Myeloid Cells
                        
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Myeloid, gene_vector = annotation_markers,pt.size = 14)
ggsave("Mye_dotplot.tif", height = 5,width = 5)

#Identify DEGS
DefaultAssay(aggregated_Myeloid) <- "SCT"
Myeloid_all_DEGs <- FindAllMarkers(aggregated_Myeloid, only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT", return.thresh = 1 )
Myeloid_all_DEGs$gene <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(Myeloid_all_DEGs))
Myeloid_all_DEGs <- Myeloid_all_DEGs %>% group_by(cluster) %>% mutate(BH_p_val_adj = p.adjust(p_val, method = "BH")) 
Myeloid_all_DEGs <- Myeloid_all_DEGs[!grepl("mt-",Myeloid_all_DEGs$gene),]#Mitochondrial RNA is typically removed during nuclear exraction but some can be bound to ER during extraction so it is removed 
Myeloid_all_DEGs <- as.data.frame(Myeloid_all_DEGs)
Myeloid_all_DEGs_sig <- subset(Myeloid_all_DEGs, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.xlsx(Myeloid_all_DEGs_sig,"Myeloid_all_DEGs_sig.xlsx")

#These functions can be found in the helper functions script
proportion_plots(aggregated_Myeloid, cond_color = treatment_colors, clust_color = clust_colors, name.clust = "Mye_prop_sub.tif", name.cond = "Mye_prop_cond.tif",height = 4, width = 4)

prop_heatmap(aggregated_Myeloid, "Mye_heat_prop.tif")

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Myeloid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T, font.size = 12)
ggsave("Myeloid_Cells_umap_sub.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Myeloid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
ggsave("Myeloid_Cells_umap_cond.tiff", height = 5,width = 5)

#Save dataset
saveRDS(aggregated_Myeloid,"Myeloid.rds")

```
## Condition comparisons
```{r echo=TRUE}
#Perform differential expression analysis between treatment Sham and MI treatments using MAST

Mye_SalShamvMalSham  <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Myeloid, ident.1 = "Saline_Sham", ident.2 = "Malonate_Sham",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    Mye_SalShamvMalSham$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(Mye_SalShamvMalSham$p_val, method='BH')
    Mye_SalShamvMalSham$gene <- rownames(Mye_SalShamvMalSham)
    Mye_SalShamvMalSham <- Mye_SalShamvMalSham[!grepl("mt-",Mye_SalShamvMalSham$gene),]
    Mye_SalShamvMalSham$comparison <- "Saline Sham vs Malonate Sham"
Mye_SalShamvMalSham_sig <- subset(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(Mye_SalShamvMalSham), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=10))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=15),head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=10)), "')")

up_down_volcano(Mye_SalShamvMalSham, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline Sham Upregulated Genes (",sum(Mye_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate Sham upregulated Genes (",sum(Mye_SalShamvMalSham_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "Mye_SalShamvMalSham_volcano.tif", up_x = max(Mye_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)+1.5,down_x = min(Mye_SalShamvMalSham$avg_log2FC)-1.5,cols = c("pink2","lightskyblue3","grey" ))

Mye_SalMIvMalMI <- FindMarkers(aggregated_Myeloid, ident.1 = "Saline_MI", ident.2 = "Malonate_MI",group.by = "orig.ident",only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT",)
    Mye_SalMIvMalMI$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(Mye_SalMIvMalMI$p_val, method='BH')
    Mye_SalMIvMalMI$gene <- rownames(Mye_SalMIvMalMI)
    Mye_SalMIvMalMI <- Mye_SalMIvMalMI[!grepl("mt-",Mye_SalMIvMalMI$gene),]
    Mye_SalMIvMalMI$comparison <- "Saline MI vs Malonate MI"
Mye_SalMIvMalMI_sig <- subset(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05 )

lab_italics <- paste0("italic('", rownames(Mye_SalMIvMalMI), "')")
select_labels <-c(head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=8),head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15))
select_labels <- paste0("italic('",c(head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC > 0)),n=8) ,head(row.names(subset(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, avg_log2FC < 0)),n=15)), "')")

up_down_volcano(Mye_SalMIvMalMI, selectLab =  select_labels,italicLab = lab_italics,up_label = paste("Saline MI Upregulated Genes (",sum(Mye_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC > 0)," significant)", sep = ""),down_label = paste("Malonate MI upregulated Genes (",sum(Mye_SalMIvMalMI_sig$avg_log2FC < 0)," significant)", sep = ""),volcano_name = "Mye_SalMIvMalMI_volcano.tif", up_x = max(Mye_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)+1.5,down_x = min(Mye_SalMIvMalMI$avg_log2FC)-1,cols = c("red3","steelblue4","grey" ))

#Save combined data
combined_Mye_DESeq <- rbind(Mye_SalShamvMalSham_sig,Mye_SalMIvMalMI_sig)
write.xlsx(combined_Mye_DESeq,"Mye_Sal_vs_Mal_sig.xlsx")
```
## Lymphoid Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Lymphoid (Lymph) population

aggregated_Lymphoid <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Lymphoid Cells")
```
###Re-normalize and re-run PCA analysis (repeat after contamination removal)

```{r echo=TRUE}
aggregated_Lymphoid <- SCTransform(aggregated_Lymphoid, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000)

aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunPCA(aggregated_Lymphoid, npcs = 50)
aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunHarmony(aggregated_Lymphoid, 
                              group.by.vars = "orig.ident",
                              reduction = "pca", assay.use = "SCT", reduction.save = "harmony_pca",project.dim= F)
aggregated_Lymphoid <- FindNeighbors(object = aggregated_Lymphoid, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- "SCT"

FindDimNumber(aggregated_Lymphoid)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Lymphoid, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")
aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunUMAP(aggregated_Lymphoid, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca",reduction.name = "umap_RNA", reduction.key = "UMAP")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Lymphoid <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Lymphoid, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Lymphoid<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Lymphoid)
aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunSVD(aggregated_Lymphoid)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Lymphoid, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")

aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunUMAP(object = aggregated_Lymphoid, reduction = 'harmony_lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap_peakunion", reduction.key = "peakunionUMAP_")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Lymphoid <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Lymphoid,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "harmony_lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:30, 2:10),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE, k.nn = 5,knn.range = 5
)
aggregated_Lymphoid <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Lymphoid,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)

aggregated_Lymphoid<- FindClusters(aggregated_Lymphoid, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.1,.5,.1) )

Idents(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- aggregated_Lymphoid$wsnn_res.0.5

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
annotation_markers <- c("Myh6","Ttn","Tnnt2","Ryr2", #Cardiomyocytes
                        "Col1a1","Postn","Pdgfra","Gsn","Htra3",#Cardiac Fibroblasts
                        "Cdh5","Fabp4","Pecam1","Kdr",#Endothelial Cells
                        "Rgs5","Kcnj8","P2ry14","Pdgfrb","Vtn",#Mural cells
                        "Mrc1","Cd68","C1qa","Ms4a7","Ccr2","Cx3cr1",#Myeloid Cells
                        "Cd79a","Ikzf3","Ms4a1","Skap1",#Lymphoid Cells
                        "Upk3b","Upk1b","Clu","Dmkn",# Epicardial cells
                        "Kcna1","Kcna2","Cdh19","Plp1")#Schwann cells

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Lymphoid, gene_vector = annotation_markers)

contaminated <- Cells(subset(aggregated_Lymphoid, idents = "3") )
low_quality <- readLines("low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2+EC+Mur.txt")
low_quality <- c(low_quality,contaminated)
writeLines(low_quality, "low_quality_BCs+CM+CFv2+EC+Mur+Lymph.txt")

aggregated_Lymphoid <- subset(aggregated_Lymphoid, idents = "3", invert = T) 

##Go back to redo normalization and check again

```
## Annotate after contamination removal
```{r echo=TRUE}
aggregated_Lymphoid<- FindClusters(aggregated_Lymphoid, graph.name = "wsnn", algorithm = 3, resolution = seq(.1,.5,.1) )

Idents(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- aggregated_Lymphoid$wsnn_res.0.4

#Use markers to identify sub-cell types
annotation_markers <- c(
                        "Cd3g","Lat","Skap1", # T Cell
                        "Ms4a1","Cd79a","Ly6d"# B Cell
                         # NK cells have mix of both
                        )

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Lymphoid, gene_vector = annotation_markers)
quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)

Lymph_cell_types <- c("TC","BC","NK")
aggregated_Lymphoid@active.ident<-factor(aggregated_Lymphoid@active.ident, labels = Lymph_cell_types)

aggregated_Lymphoid$Cell_state <- Idents(aggregated_Lymphoid)

DotPlot_SCT(seurat_obj = aggregated_Lymphoid, gene_vector = annotation_markers)
ggsave("Lymph_dotplot.tif", height = 8,width = 8)

#Identify DEGS
DefaultAssay(aggregated_Lymphoid) <- "SCT"
Lymph_all_DEGs <- FindAllMarkers(aggregated_Lymphoid, only.pos = F, min.pct = 0.05, logfc.threshold = .25, test.use = "MAST", recorrect_umi = F, assay = "SCT" )
Lymph_all_DEGs$BH_p_val_adj <- p.adjust(Lymph_all_DEGs$p_val, method='BH')
Lymph_all_DEGs$gene <- sub("\\..*", "", rownames(Lymph_all_DEGs))
Lymph_all_DEGs <- Lymph_all_DEGs[!grepl("mt-",Lymph_all_DEGs$gene),]
Lymph_all_DEGs_sig <- subset(Lymph_all_DEGs, BH_p_val_adj < 0.05)
write.xlsx(Lymph_all_DEGs_sig,"Lymph_all_DEGs_sig.xlsx")

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T, font.size = 14)
ggsave("Lymphoid_Cells_umap_sub.tif", height = 5,width = 5)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Lymphoid, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)
ggsave("Lymphoid_Cells_umap_cond.tif", height = 5,width = 5)

#Save dataset
saveRDS(aggregated_Lymphoid,"Lymphoid.rds")

```
## Epicardial Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Epicardial population (Population so small and homogeneous its not worth assessing contamination)

aggregated_Epicardial <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Epicardial Cells")
aggregated_Epicardial <- SCTransform(aggregated_Epicardial, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000)

aggregated_Epicardial <- RunPCA(aggregated_Epicardial, npcs = 50)
aggregated_Epicardial <- RunHarmony(aggregated_Epicardial, 
                              group.by.vars = "orig.ident",
                              reduction = "pca", assay.use = "SCT", reduction.save = "harmony_pca",project.dim= F)
aggregated_Epicardial <- FindNeighbors(object = aggregated_Epicardial, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Epicardial) <- "SCT"

FindDimNumber(aggregated_Epicardial)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Epicardial, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")
aggregated_Epicardial <- RunUMAP(aggregated_Epicardial, dims = 1:50, reduction = "harmony_pca",reduction.name = "umap_RNA", reduction.key = "UMAP")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Epicardial) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Epicardial <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Epicardial, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Epicardial<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Epicardial)
aggregated_Epicardial <- RunSVD(aggregated_Epicardial)

ElbowPlot(aggregated_Epicardial, ndims = 50, reduction = "lsi")

aggregated_Epicardial <- RunUMAP(object = aggregated_Epicardial, reduction = 'harmony_lsi', dims = 2:50, reduction.name = "umap_peakunion", reduction.key = "peakunionUMAP_")

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Epicardial) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Epicardial <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Epicardial,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "harmony_lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:30, 2:10),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE, k.nn = 5,knn.range = 5
)
aggregated_Epicardial <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Epicardial,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)
aggregated_Epicardial$Cell_state <- "Epi"

saveRDS(aggregated_Epicardial,"Epicardial.rds")

quick_CT_plot(aggregated_Epicardial, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F,label = T,font.size = 8)
quick_cond_plot(aggregated_Epicardial, 2,"WNN_umap",legend = F)

```
## Schwann Cells
```{r echo=TRUE}

#Subset Schwann population (Population so small and homogeneous its not worth assessing contamination)

aggregated_Schwann <- subset(aggregated_samples, idents = "Schwann Cells") 

### Too few cells for normalization and PCA and RNA umap analysis
#aggregated_Schwann <- SCTransform(aggregated_Schwann, vars.to.regress = c("percent.mt","percent.ribo"),vst.flavor = "v2", method = "glmGamPoi", variable.features.n = 5000) 

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Schwann) <- "SCT"

DefaultAssay(aggregated_Schwann) <- "peakunion"
aggregated_Schwann <- FindTopFeatures(aggregated_Schwann, min.cutoff = 10)
aggregated_Schwann<- RunTFIDF(aggregated_Schwann)
aggregated_Schwann <- RunSVD(aggregated_Schwann)


DefaultAssay(aggregated_Schwann) <- "SCT"
aggregated_Schwann <- FindMultiModalNeighbors(
  object = aggregated_Schwann,
  reduction.list = list("harmony_pca", "lsi"), 
  dims.list = list(1:30, 2:10),# Determinded to be optimal amount of dims through visualization
  modality.weight.name = c("SCT.weight","peakunion.weight"),
  verbose = TRUE, k.nn = 5,knn.range = 5
)
aggregated_Schwann <- RunUMAP(
  object = aggregated_Schwann,
  nn.name = "weighted.nn",
  assay = "SCT",
  reduction.name = "WNN_umap",
  reduction.key = "WNN_UMAP_",
  verbose = TRUE,
)

aggregated_Schwann$Cell_state <- "Schwann"

saveRDS(aggregated_Schwann,"Schwann.rds")

```
